prestazioni: Garrett GT2260S turbocharger upgrade for the T200 1.4L MultiAir Turbo (E.TorQ) engine, paired with a custom 3.5" titanium-aluminide turbine wheel to reduce inertia by 25% while maintaining 1.2 bar of boost, supported by a Forge Motorsport 44mm external wastegate with a billet aluminum valve and a custom 3D-printed Inconel downpipe to eliminate turbo lag and improve spool by 400 RPM

Full Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with 70mm diameter piping, a 200-cell catalytic converter, and a carbon-fiber muffler with an electronically controlled bypass valve, reducing backpressure by 38% and adding 28 HP while maintaining EU6 emissions compliance

Abarth-specific Motec M150 ECU with a custom 4D ignition and fuel map, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 0261S02080 high-flow fuel pump (340 L/h) and ID1000x injectors, enabling a 9,000 RPM redline and a 220 HP output at 1.4 bar boost with 98 RON fuel, while integrating a traction control system with 12 levels of adjustability and launch control via the Abarth Corsa Mode button
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit for the 695 Biposto, featuring hand-laid carbon-fiber fenders with integrated air vents, a 30mm extended front splitter with adjustable dive planes, and a ducktail spoiler with a Gurney flap, all finished in Satin Bianco Perla with exposed carbon weave accents

OMP Abarth 695 Biposto-specific carbon-fiber bucket seats with FIA 8862-2009 homologation, featuring a 5-point harness pass-through, adjustable lumbar support, and a weight reduction of 12 kg per seat, paired with a custom roll cage designed by GPR Italy with TIG-welded 4130 chromoly tubing and a removable half-cage section for daily usability

Brembo GT 6-piston monobloc calipers with 380mm two-piece floating rotors (cross-drilled and slotted) for the front, paired with Brembo 4-piston calipers and 320mm rotors at the rear, all finished in Abarth Rosso with gold hardware, complemented by custom carbon-fiber brake ducts from Eventuri to optimize cooling and reduce unsprung weight by 3.2 kg
